description: UI/UX Overhaul - Polish the DailyTracker app with NativeTabs, SF Symbols, typography scale, card redesign, and smooth layout transitions on SDK 54

userStories.title: Add ThemeProvider and restructure routes into tab groups
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the route structure reorganized into tab groups with Stack layouts so NativeTabs can be added next.
acceptanceCriteria: Wrap root Stack in `app/_layout.tsx` with `ThemeProvider` using `DarkTheme` from `@react-navigation/native`
Create `app/(tabs)/(hoje)/_layout.tsx` with Stack: `title: 'Hoje'`, `headerLargeTitle: true`, transparent header styles
Move `app/(tabs)/index.tsx` content to `app/(tabs)/(hoje)/index.tsx`
Create `app/(tabs)/(treino)/_layout.tsx` with Stack: `title: 'Treino'`, `headerLargeTitle: true`, transparent header styles
Move `app/(tabs)/treino.tsx` content to `app/(tabs)/(treino)/index.tsx`
Create `app/(tabs)/(historico)/_layout.tsx` with Stack: `title: 'Histórico'`, `headerLargeTitle: true`, transparent header styles
Move `app/(tabs)/historico.tsx` content to `app/(tabs)/(historico)/index.tsx`
Create `app/(tabs)/(historico)/dia-detalhe.tsx` route with `presentation: 'formSheet'`, `sheetGrabberVisible: true`, `sheetAllowedDetents: [0.5, 1.0]`
Move DiaDetalhe modal logic into the new route — accept `date` search param, read from useHistoryStore
Remove old `<Modal>` usage from historico screen, replace with `router.push('/(historico)/dia-detalhe?date=...')`
Update `app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx` to reference new group names in Tabs.Screen: `(hoje)`, `(treino)`, `(historico)`

Stack header styles: `headerTransparent: true`, `headerShadowVisible: false`, `headerLargeTitleShadowVisible: false`, `headerLargeStyle: { backgroundColor: 'transparent' }`, `headerBlurEffect: 'none'`
All three screens render correctly with native Stack headers
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Replace JS Tabs with NativeTabs
userStories.description: As a user, I want a system-native tab bar so the app feels like a first-class iOS/Android citizen.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace custom `GlassTabBar` + JS `Tabs` in `app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx` with `NativeTabs` from `expo-router/unstable-native-tabs`
SDK 54 syntax: use standalone `Icon`, `Label`, `VectorIcon` imports (not compound `NativeTabs.Trigger.X`)

Tab icons use SF Symbols via `Icon` with `sf` prop: Hoje `sf={{ default: 'checkmark.circle', selected: 'checkmark.circle.fill' }}`, Treino `sf={{ default: 'dumbbell', selected: 'dumbbell.fill' }}`, Histórico `sf={{ default: 'calendar', selected: 'calendar' }}`
Labels: `<Label>Hoje</Label>`, `<Label>Treino</Label>`, `<Label>Histórico</Label>`
NativeTabs trigger `name` matches route group exactly: `name='(hoje)'`, `name='(treino)'`, `name='(historico)'`
Set `tintColor='#f59e0b'` on NativeTabs
Remove `expo-glass-effect` import from tab layout
Remove old `GlassTabBar` component code from the file
Each screen has `ScrollView` as first child with `contentInsetAdjustmentBehavior='automatic'` (required for tab bar transparency on iOS 18)
Content uses `contentContainerStyle` for padding (not wrapper View padding)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Replace all FontAwesome and Ionicons with MaterialCommunityIcons
userStories.description: As a user, I want consistent, meaningful icons throughout the app so the interface is easy to scan.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace ALL `FontAwesome` and `Ionicons` imports with `MaterialCommunityIcons` from `@expo/vector-icons`

Icon mapping: checkbox-marked-circle-outline/checkbox-blank-circle-outline (check items), water/water-outline (water), tea/tea-outline (tea), run-fast (cardio), dumbbell (treino), food-apple (food), pill (pills), calendar-month (calendar), fire (streak), cog (settings), moon-waning-crescent (dia off), lightbulb-outline (tips), chevron-down/chevron-up (expand/collapse), close (close), plus (add), minus-circle-outline (remove), trophy (trophy), alert-circle-outline (alert), information-outline (info)
Icon size scale: 16px inline, 20px list items, 24px cards/headers, 28px empty states
Zero remaining FontAwesome or Ionicons imports in codebase
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add typography scale to theme constants
userStories.description: As a user, I want clear visual hierarchy in text so I can scan information quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `typography` object to `constants/theme.ts` with inline style objects: caption (fontSize 11, text.secondary), footnote (fontSize 13, text.secondary), body (fontSize 15, text.primary), callout (fontSize 16, fontWeight '600', text.primary), headline (fontSize 17, fontWeight '700', text.primary), title3 (fontSize 20, fontWeight '700', text.primary)
Add `fontVariant: ['tabular-nums']` to all numeric displays (ProgressBar percentage, HidratacaoCard amounts, CardioCard minutes, StatsCard numbers, Calendario day numbers)
Add `selectable` prop to Text elements showing data (stats, percentages, counts)
Apply typography scale via inline `style` prop across all screens (NativeWind className stays for layout)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Redesign Card component with continuous corners and shadows
userStories.description: As a user, I want cards that feel tactile and polished with proper depth and spacing.
acceptanceCriteria: Update `components/ui/Card.tsx`: borderRadius 16, borderCurve 'continuous', boxShadow '0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
If boxShadow doesn't render on RN 0.81.5, fall back to shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius on iOS + elevation on Android
Remove hard border — use shadow for depth instead
Consistent inner padding 16px, gap 12px between cards
Card used by: PeriodoSection, HidratacaoCard, CardioCard, StatsCard, DicasSection — verify all still render correctly
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Redesign Hoje screen layout and components
userStories.description: As a user, I want the daily checklist screen to feel organized and scannable.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings button as `headerRight` in Stack.Screen options inside `app/(tabs)/(hoje)/_layout.tsx` — uses MaterialCommunityIcons 'cog' icon
Move date display below header (not a custom header text)
Dia Off toggle as a prominent card at the top (not inline with date)
Progress bar: thicker track (height 12), rounded ends, percentage label right-aligned with fontVariant tabular-nums
PeriodoSection: cleaner expand/collapse with chevron-up/chevron-down icon rotation
CheckItem: min 44pt touch target height, checkbox icons using MaterialCommunityIcons checkbox-marked-circle-outline / checkbox-blank-circle-outline
HidratacaoCard: stepper buttons with plus/minus-circle-outline icons, cleaner progress display
CardioCard: cleaner input area with plus icon add button
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Redesign Treino screen layout and components
userStories.description: As a user, I want the workout screen to clearly show my exercises with visual weight.
acceptanceCriteria: Workout day name + muscle group shown as subtitle below header (not custom text element)
ExercicioItem: exercise number as accent-colored badge, clearer series display
SerieBadge: consistent pill design with borderCurve 'continuous', keep color coding (WS=amber, TS=red, BS=green, CS=warning)
Dia Off empty state: centered, moon-waning-crescent icon at 48px, descriptive text
DicasSection with SeriesLegend at top of training tips
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Redesign Histórico screen and StatsCard layout
userStories.description: As a user, I want the history screen to feel like a native calendar experience with clear stats.
acceptanceCriteria: Calendario: slightly larger cells, bolder today indicator with accent border, borderCurve 'continuous' on day cells
StatsCard: horizontal layout for key metrics (streak, weekly, monthly) — each metric shows icon + number (title3 style) + label (caption style) stacked vertically
Empty state: calendar-outline icon at 48px + 'Nenhum dado ainda' descriptive text
DiaDetalhe route (created in US-001) renders correctly with date param, shows progress bar and missed items
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Redesign Config screen as native settings page
userStories.description: As a user, I want the settings screen to feel like a native iOS settings page.
acceptanceCriteria: Group related settings into sections with section headers (footnote style, uppercase, text.secondary color)
Each setting row: min 44pt height, label left, control right
Time inputs: cleaner inline style resembling iOS time display
Hydration interval selector: segmented-control style (1h, 2h, 3h in a row)
Switch components: accent trackColor when on, muted when off
Proper dividers between rows (hairline width, inset 16px from left)
ScrollView with contentInsetAdjustmentBehavior='automatic'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add LayoutAnimation transitions and verify haptics
userStories.description: As a user, I want smooth visual feedback when UI state changes so the app feels responsive.
acceptanceCriteria: Enable LayoutAnimation on Android: `UIManager.setLayoutAnimationEnabledExperimental?.(true)` in `app/_layout.tsx`

Add `LayoutAnimation.configureNext(LayoutAnimation.Presets.easeInEaseOut)` before state changes: PeriodoSection expand/collapse, DicasSection expand/collapse, check/uncheck items, adding/removing cardio sessions, progress bar width changes
Verify haptic feedback (expo-haptics Light impact) exists on: check/uncheck, stepper +/- buttons, Dia Off toggle
Haptics conditionally called only on iOS using `process.env.EXPO_OS === 'ios'`
No Reanimated entering/exiting animations — lightweight LayoutAnimation only
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Clean up unused dependencies and dead code
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to remove unused dependencies and dead code from the migration.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove `expo-glass-effect` from package.json and run npm install
Remove `expo-blur` from package.json and run npm install
Zero remaining FontAwesome or Ionicons imports (grep confirms none)
Old flat route files removed: `app/(tabs)/index.tsx`, `app/(tabs)/treino.tsx`, `app/(tabs)/historico.tsx` (if not already removed in US-001)
Old GlassTabBar code fully removed (if not already removed in US-002)
Old DiaDetalhe Modal component removed from `components/historico/` (if not already removed in US-001)
No unused component files remain in `components/`
Run `npx tsc --noEmit` — passes clean with zero errors
App runs in Expo Go without crashes
